strings.tag: Hi [name], this is a test string from room009 - inside Freebird's house.
Are you here to help us look for Freebird? She's been gone almost 2 days now!
I'll help in any way I can. I just want to get my daughter home safe.
It was just two days ago. She gave a concert at the Celestial Casino. Lawrence and I both went to watch her perform.
Of course. I'll help in any way I can. Just show me the picture.
Oh, she was so kind and gentle. She has no enemies.
Lawrence is her boyfriend. He and Freebird went out that night after the show.
I'm involved in an ongoing case that may be related. May I ask you some questions?
When was the last time you saw Freebird?
May I show you a picture of someone we think might be Freebird?
Would anyone want to hurt Freebird?
Who's Lawrence?
Thank you for your time.
Oh, that looks almost like my daughter, but the hair's all wrong. And her eyes are blue, not brown.
Of course. Just show me what to do.
Can I take a DNA sample for comparison?
I'll use my DNA swabs to get a saliva sample.
Well? Have you learned anything more about my daughter?
Oh, no. No, no, no, no, no. Please, you've got to find who did this!
I'm sorry to tell you, but Freebird is dead. Her body was found in the desert.
Thank you for your time.
Do you know anything about my missing girlfriend? Freebird Reynolds?
Of course. I'll help out in any way I can.
I saw her show at the Celestial two day ago. We went out to dinner afterwards, then split up. But she was acting strange all through dinner ...
Oh, man, that doesn't sound good. But I'll take a look at it, sure.
No ... well, maybe. I never liked her agent - he didn't care for Freebird, just the money she made. And he'd do anything for publicity.
She just seemed nervous and on-edge. She ... she wasn't herself.
I'm involved in an ongoing case that may be related. May I ask you some questions?
When was the last time you saw Freebird?
May I show you a picture of someone we think might be Freebird?
Would anyone want to hurt Freebird?
What was strange about your dinner date?
Thank you for your time.
That almost looks like Freebird, but ... I can't be sure.
Thank you for your assistance.
Well? Do you have any new information about Freebird?
Oh, no. That's ... I can't believe it. I just can't.
Man, I'll help anyway I can. What do you need?
No problem. They're the same ones I am wearing right now, but you can have them.
You can have anything, if it will help find Freebird's killer.
Yes, that's my car. Why?
What! It wasn't broken when I drove here! How could that have happened?
No! I've never seen that knife before.
I'm sorry, but Freebird's dead. Her body was found in the desert.
I need to get some evidence from you.
I need the shoes you wore the night of the concert
I need to get your fingerprints.
Do you know who owns the car out front?
Are you aware your window is broken?
Is this your hunting knife I found in the car?
Thank you for your time.
What can I help you with?
Did you talk to the mother and the boyfriend? Maybe you should show them your facial reconstruction picture.
We need concrete evidence to proceed. The mother will let you take a DNA sample. Why not put those swabs in your inventory to work?
I think there's more evidence here.
I think we're done here. Time to move on.
How can I find out if our victim is the missing girl?
The mother maybe recognized Freebird in the picture. Now what?
I'll go do that.
Are we finished here?
I'll keep looking for more evidence.
Let's get out of here.
What can I help you with?
You need to do a thorough digital forensics investigation, but not here. We'll use the computers at the lab to process the evidence.
I think there's more evidence here.
I think we're done here. Time to move on.
Where's the last place we found some footprints? Remember, we need some way of getting the prints to the lab.
Freebird may have written down the code somewhere. We should examine all her possessions, including her computer.
You printed out the diary code from her computer, right? Try using it on the diary.
Have you checked outside?
What can I do with Freebird's computer?
Are we finished here?
What should I do about the footprints out front?
I'll keep looking for more evidence.
Let's get out of here.
Not yet. I'll go take a look outside.

REMEMBER -

Call Mom about dinner at her house Sunday night

Ms. Reynolds,

The Starry Night Talent Agency would be delighted to accept you as a client, provided you are able to break out of your ongoing contract with Mr. Maury Wan.

We look forward to working with you soon.

Sincerely,
The Starry Night Talent Agency

Nightlife Cafe

2 entrees - $52.00
2 drinks - $23.00
2 desserts - $20.00

Total - $95.00

Paid with credit card ending in 1234
Ms. Freebird Reynolds

Shopping List

Fresh fruit
Coffee
Bread
Milk
Cereal
Ice Cream
